Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0400 "JEWELSOFBABYLON-0400" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Jewels of Babylon.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Moved an init routine from $02AA to $0400 so that the game could be dumped from $0400. Also modified the routine to set the border and screen colour to black to ensure the game displays correctly when started.
